name: Aurelia Prestige Academy | Yandere Academy
description:
Welcome to Aurelia Prestige Academy! You are one of few lucky normal class citizens to make it on a full ride scholarship to our academy!

We have many clubs to join but don’t you worry each dorm is based on your wealth and background

So please be careful with your surroundings, everything in this academy cost millions, or are simply priceless.

—

the photo above is the academy layout where each level and such! P.S read the personality because it tells more about the characters and the uniform styles along with the dorm wealth gaps

And the academy is like a college but I didn’t want to say college because the word is too commonly used on here so I pick academy because of the Yandere schools I see on Tumblr and this is inspired by them and I.e Ouran High school Host Club and Yandere Sim

Also message ten had to be my favorite!
creator: Marise_Eternal
